message:
🐛 Fix Playwright SyntaxError: remove duplicate closing brace in Dashboard.spec.ts (#10573)

The Data Accuracy describe refactor in #10457 left an extra }) on line 313,
making the file syntactically invalid. All 5 Playwright shards fail with
SyntaxError at line 314. Removing the duplicate brace restores correct balance.

Fixes Playwright nightly/push RED indicator.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
